title: Agent API Endpoints
summary: Documents all Agent CRUD endpoints plus tool and knowledge base attach/detach operations with request/response examples.

title: Auth API Endpoints
summary: Documents POST register/login/refresh/logout and GET me endpoints with httpOnly cookie-based JWT authentication.

title: Conversation API Endpoints
summary: Documents Conversation CRUD and message listing with pagination, including request/response examples.

title: Knowledge Base API Endpoints
summary: Documents Knowledge Base CRUD, document upload (multipart), and semantic query endpoints with request/response examples.

title: Multi-Agent API Endpoints
summary: Documents the supervisor and peer collaboration endpoints and the providers listing endpoint with request/response examples.

title: Tool API Endpoints
summary: Documents Tool CRUD endpoints and the test endpoint that builds and invokes tools via the tool registry.

title: WebSocket Chat Protocol
summary: Documents the full WebSocket protocol for chat streaming in both directions -- client-to-server messages and server-to-client events.

title: Workflow API Endpoints
summary: Documents Workflow CRUD, graph save, execute, and run history endpoints with request/response examples.

title: Socket Service (NestJS)
summary: Documents the NestJS Socket Service — architecture, rooms, emit API, frontend integration, and event conventions.

title: Dependencies - All Packages & Version Policy
summary: All backend (pyproject.toml) and frontend (package.json) dependencies with rationale. Version policy uses minimum version constraints.

title: Deployment - Docker Compose & Environment
summary: Docker Compose orchestration. Services extend from services/ dir. Backend port 8000, frontend 3000, postgres 5432, redis 6379, rabbitmq 5672/15672.

title: Operations - Observability, Payouts, Bootstrap
summary: Production runbook — JSON access logs, Sentry SDK, /healthz + /readyz, Stripe Connect onboarding, operator CLIs (seed_admin, seed_starter_templates).

title: Project Structure - Monorepo Layout
summary: Monorepo with apps/ (backend + frontend), services/ (postgres, redis, rabbitmq), docs/ (specifications), mcp-docs/ (MCP server).

title: System Overview - Tech Stack & Data Flow
summary: High-level system architecture. FastAPI backend + Next.js 16 frontend + PostgreSQL/pgvector. LangGraph for agent orchestration. JWT httpOnly cookies for auth.

title: Workflow Execution Engine Redesign
summary: Redesign of workflow execution engine — structured per-node I/O, items-based data flow, N-way branching, merge waiting, and new node executors.

title: Agent Executor
summary: LangGraph-based agent executor that builds LLM instances, assembles tool sets, and streams execution events to callers.

title: Agents
summary: Agent model with LLM config, CRUD operations, and attach/detach for tools and knowledge bases via junction tables.

title: Authentication
summary: JWT-based auth via httpOnly cookies, bcrypt password hashing, access/refresh token flow, and get_current_user dependency.

title: Application Configuration
summary: Settings class using pydantic-settings, all environment variables, defaults, and .env file loading.

title: Conversations
summary: Conversation and Message models, WebSocket chat handler with LangGraph streaming, save_message with counter updates.

title: Database Layer
summary: SQLAlchemy async setup with DeclarativeBase, UUID and Timestamp mixins, async session factory, and get_db dependency.

title: Knowledge Bases
summary: KnowledgeBase and Document models, ingestion pipeline (parse, chunk, embed, store), and cosine similarity retrieval via pgvector.

title: LLM Providers
summary: Unified LLM factory producing LangChain BaseChatModel instances from provider name and config, supporting OpenAI, Anthropic, and Ollama.

title: Tools
summary: Tool model, ToolRegistry with builder pattern, four built-in builders (HTTP, CodeExec, WebScrape, DBQuery), JSON Schema to Pydantic conversion, and CRUD endpoints.

title: Multi-Agent Orchestration
summary: Two multi-agent patterns built on LangGraph -- supervisor (hub-and-spoke delegation) and peer (sequential collaboration chain).

title: File Storage
summary: Local filesystem storage layer for uploaded files with UUID-based naming and subdirectory organization.

title: Workflow Engine
summary: Workflow system that compiles a graph of nodes and edges into a LangGraph StateGraph, executes it, and tracks runs with per-node logging.

title: API Conventions - REST, Status Codes, Auth, Errors
summary: REST API at /api prefix. JWT in httpOnly cookies. Standard status codes. Error format: {detail: string}. Pagination via limit/offset query params.

title: Backend Conventions - Python Code Style & Module Pattern
summary: Backend uses 4-layer module pattern: router.py (endpoints) → service.py (business logic) → models/ (ORM) → schemas.py (Pydantic). Python 3.12, async everywhere, type hints required.

title: Component Patterns - shadcn/ui with @base-ui/react
summary: shadcn/ui uses @base-ui/react (NOT @radix-ui). No asChild prop. Use buttonVariants() for link styling, render prop for trigger composition.

title: Database Conventions - Naming, Types, Indexes
summary: snake_case plural table names. UUID v4 PKs. JSONB for flexible configs. TimestampMixin for created_at/updated_at. Soft delete via status/is_archived.

title: Frontend Conventions - Feature Architecture & State Management
summary: Feature-based architecture. Thin App Router (pages only have metadata + View import). TanStack Query for server state, Zustand only for UI state. No cross-feature imports.

title: Database Schema Overview
summary: Overview of all 16 database tables, their relationships, shared mixins, and naming conventions.

title: Table: agents
summary: Agent configuration table with LLM settings, system prompt, and N-N junctions to tools and knowledge bases.

title: Table: api_keys
summary: Encrypted API key storage for external LLM providers, with per-user default key selection and usage tracking.

title: Tables: conversations, messages
summary: Conversation and message tables supporting chat history, message branching, tool call logging, token tracking, and user feedback.

title: Tables: knowledge_bases, documents, document_chunks
summary: Three-table knowledge pipeline -- knowledge base configuration, uploaded documents with processing status, and pgvector-embedded chunks for semantic search.

title: Table: tools
summary: Custom tool definitions with type-specific JSONB config and JSON Schema input/output declarations.

title: Table: users
summary: User account table with authentication fields and one-to-many ownership relationships to all major resources.

title: Tables: workflows, workflow_nodes, workflow_edges, workflow_runs
summary: Four-table workflow system storing versioned DAGs of typed nodes and edges, with execution history including per-node traces and cost tracking.

title: Agent Creation Flow
summary: End-to-end flow from creating an agent through configuring LLM, attaching tools and knowledge bases, to testing via the preview chat.

title: Chat with Agent Flow
summary: End-to-end flow from creating a conversation through WebSocket connection, sending a message, streaming response with tool calls, to message persistence.

title: Document Upload and Ingestion Flow
summary: End-to-end flow from file upload through storage, parsing, chunking, embedding with OpenAI, and storing vectors in pgvector.

title: Multi-Agent Collaboration Flow
summary: End-to-end flow for both supervisor (delegate to workers) and peer (sequential chain) multi-agent patterns using LangGraph StateGraphs.

title: Tool Execution Flow
summary: End-to-end flow from agent deciding to call a tool through registry.build(), execution, and result return to the LLM.

title: User Registration Flow
summary: End-to-end flow from register form submission through cookie setting, query cache update, redirect, and dashboard loading.

title: Workflow Execution Flow
summary: End-to-end flow from saving a workflow graph through compilation to LangGraph StateGraph, executing nodes, and tracking run results.

title: Axios API Client and Endpoint Constants
summary: Documents the Axios client configuration with withCredentials, the 401 refresh interceptor, and the API endpoint constants map.

title: Next.js App Router Structure
summary: Documents all 14 routes across two route groups (auth and dashboard), metadata export rules, and when to use the "use client" directive.

title: Agents Feature Module
summary: Documents the agents feature types, service layer, React Query hooks, and all views (Library, List, Detail, Create, Editor).

title: Agent Editor Split-View Layout
summary: Documents the AgentEditorView split layout and its sub-components -- KnowledgeUploadSection, ToolsSelector, MultiAgentSection, and AgentPreviewChat.

title: Auth Feature Module
summary: Documents the auth feature including types, service, hooks (useAuth, useLogin, useRegister, useLogout), views, and Zod-validated forms.

title: Chat Feature Module
summary: Documents the chat feature types, service, Zustand store (chatStore), useChat hook, and WebSocket integration for real-time streaming.

title: Chat UI Components
summary: Documents ChatWindow, MessageBubble, ChatInput, and StreamMarkdown components including auto-scroll behavior and streaming display logic.

title: Settings View
summary: Documents the SettingsView component covering API key management for LLM providers and general configuration options.

title: Tools Feature Module
summary: Documents the tools feature types (including TOOL_TYPE_META), service, hooks, ToolListView, ToolCreateDialog, and ToolDetailSheet.

title: Workflows Feature Module
summary: Documents the workflows feature types, service, hooks, Zustand store (workflowEditorStore), and NODE_TYPES constants.

title: Workflow Editor View and Canvas
summary: Documents WorkflowEditorView layout, Canvas with React Flow setup, NodePalette drag-and-drop, NodeInspector config editing, and WorkflowToolbar controls.

title: Workflow Node Types and BaseNode Component
summary: Documents all 8 node types with their handles, config fields, icon/color mapping, and the BaseNode React Flow component.

title: Workflow Editor Architecture Research (n8n & Dify)
summary: Research into n8n and Dify workflow editor architectures — design patterns, folder structures, node type systems, handle/output patterns, and proposed architecture for AgentForge.

title: Dashboard Layout, Sidebar, and Header
summary: Documents the dashboard layout with auth guard, Sidebar navigation items, Header with user dropdown, and dark theme setup.

title: Provider Composition
summary: Documents the Providers.tsx composition tree including QueryProvider, ThemeProvider, and Toaster setup.

title: WebSocket Client for Chat Streaming
summary: Documents the createChatWS() factory function, WSMessage discriminated union types, and the handler callback interface.
